control_awareness: The system enforces approval thresholds requiring department_head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. Pre-PO approval is mandatory before purchase order issuance. Segregation of duties prevents the requester from self-approving.
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will be routed to the department_head for approval, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: Given the absence of quarter-end pressure and the amount exceeding one million, the appropriate step is to create a single purchase request for the full amount to trigger department_head approval. This minimizes avoidable approval lead time while following all control requirements and allowed actions.
reason: The total amount is 1,750,000 which requires department_head approval according to the control P2P-C-001. Creating a single purchase request with the full amount is straightforward and auditable. This meets the objective to obtain needed services before quarter-end without unnecessary incremental requests.
